description: MCP server manifest used by `agentmesh doctor` to validate goose config. Verified April 2026.

expected.name: linear
expected.description: Linear official remote MCP server (OAuth in browser, no env var needed).

expected.name: notion
expected.description: Notion official remote MCP server (OAuth in browser, no env var needed).

expected.name: slack
expected.description: Slack via korotovsky/slack-mcp-server (browser tokens, not bot tokens).

expected.name: gsuite
expected.description: Gmail + Calendar + Drive via mcp-gsuite (uvx, OAuth via .gauth.json + .accounts.json).
